---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for podman-ai-stack.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always
frustrated when [...]

## Describe the Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Engineering Considerations

- Does this require a new Quadlet variable?
- Should it be applied to rootless, rootfull, or both?
- Are there new container dependencies or environment variables needed in
  `/etc/sysconfig/podman-ai-stack`?

## Describe Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've
considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
